title: SimpleValkyrien
body:
![Valkyrien:Simple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a4947a84ea274e62e4066ad6d65d54f2a40f7ba.png)

---
| Project | Content |
|---------|---------|
| **Game Version** | Minecraft 1.20.1 + Forge 47.4.0 |
| **Number of Mods** | 150+ (including core/enhancement/optimization mods) |
| **Core Framework** | Valhelsia Skies 2.3.0 + Create Mod 0.5.1.j |
| **Visual Optimization** | BSL v8.4.02.2 Shader + MandalasGUI Dakmode Resource Pack |
---

This is a **simple** Valkyrien survival modpack that, aside from essential mods like Valkyrie and Mechanical Power, includes only **vanilla-enhancing** mods to maintain the authentic Minecraft experience.

We've **added** _furniture, firearms, and bug-fixing mods_ to enrich your gameplay. You can use furniture and Valkyrie blocks to build your dream airship, or craft firearms to explore the world. The pack features terrain optimization mods that create smoother, more realistic landscapes than the vanilla game. Combined with shaders and distant horizons, this allows you to fully appreciate the **game's scenery**.

With around **150 mods**, this is a substantial pack. To ensure smooth performance, optimization mods are included to prevent lag—your game should run smoothly _without slowing to a crawl_.

![Screenshot1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a7ec1c5f75a538894f99ec27a19346be41a485.png)
